title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 Tech Talk argues that AI still struggles to reliably edit Word documents because .docx files operate more like programs with complex internal structure than plain text files. Humans can edit one document at a time and maintain contextual integrity, while AI requires treating documents as software to operate at scale without introducing errors.
